updateNote: Day 65 5:27 PM PT refresh — IRGC warns war 'likely' to resume; armed forces 'fully prepared.' IDF destroys ~120 Hezbollah sites over weekend; 41 killed in 24h of Israeli strikes across S. Lebanon. White phosphorus reported Marjayoun. Trump sends 'hostilities terminated' letter to Congress, skirting War Powers deadline. Senate rejected War Powers Resolution 50-47 (Collins broke from GOP). Rubio invokes emergency for $8.6B arms sales bypass (Qatar $4.01B, Kuwait $2.5B, Israel $992M, UAE). Iran submits 14-point peace proposal via Pakistan — Trump 'not satisfied.' Treasury sanctions Hengli Petrochemical + 40 shipping firms + 35 shadow banks. OFAC warns shippers on Iran toll payments. US blockade cost Iran $4.8B — 31 tankers/53M barrels stuck; exports -70% to 567K bpd; 12-24 days storage left. Spirit Airlines ceases operations — first US corporate casualty. Pentagon withdrawing 5,000 troops from Germany. Jordan strikes in Syria's Sweida. Netanyahu convenes security cabinet. OPEC+ 206K bpd increase (symbolic). Brent $111.25 (+39.3%), WTI $103.82 (+37.5%). Gas $4.433. Hormuz Day 62. Lebanon DT ~2,700/8,300.
